title: Maple
description: Backport Cherry and bamboo.Add maple tree.
body:
![Cherry Village](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/25/F7PqTBgxLlv9H3C.jpg)
#### Maple(Fabric) requires Fabric Loader, Fabric API  and Terrablender.
#### Maple(Forge) requires Terrablender.


#### Discord Link: https://discord.gg/pDaMyHDfBy


#### Backport Cherry and Bamboo Blocks to 1.19,1.18.

 

Backported Blocks (1.19 & 1.18)

Cherry and Bamboo Blocks, including fences, trapdoors, logs, wood, signs, slabs, stairs, and doors.
    

#### New Biome
  
Maple Forest: A vibrant landscape of intertwined maple and red maple trees, adorned with flowers and fallen leaves.  
  
Cherry Blossom Grove: Features glowing cherry blossoms, falling petals, and natural hot springs that provide a healing effect.  
  
Grove Cherry Biome (1.18-1.19.4): A biome rich in cherry trees and bees.  
  
Naturally generated hot springs that provide a healing effect to players  
![maple biome](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/XWrBz3s1FHvQLVx.png)  
![cherry biome](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/g3HKrvNDlTz4uyR.png)


#### **Furniture** *(New in 1.4.0!)*
- **Sitting Cushions, Windows, Coffee Tables, Tables, Tea Tables, and Chairs**.
  ![5.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/ncgYLzaswdyf4Wj.png)
- ![6.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/CxmS3yoiAhgakv8.png)

#### Food:
Added new foods such as Beef Rice and Cheese, as well as a variety of juices.  

Added equipment such as juicers and tea makers.  

![8.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/Fi5qMLK1Ch8ck6p.png)  
![7.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/Kx9PVgtv5q3MGUW.png)  
#### Structures:
o	Added structures such as hot spring pavilions and cherry blossom villages, adding more exploration elements to the game.
![9.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/ejUP1KQSIONqV7i.png)
![10.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/4wvC3JlDi8MYX2R.png)  
#### More Snowballs:


A variety of snowballs have special effects or can cause damage:  

Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Mixed Snowballs can damage monsters or players.  

The Teleporting Snowball can randomly teleport any entity a certain distance.  

The Instant Health Snowball can be used to quickly restore health.  

The Poison Snowball can give the target a poison effect.  


#### Decorative Blocks
Grout: A new building and decorative material that comes in various colors and is easy to obtain.

Gilded Sea Lantern: Available in iron and gold versions, serving as a decorative material.

Tatami: A Japanese-style decorative material.

Glass Stairs and Slabs: Colorful glass stairs and slabs, excellent for decoration.

 ![block](https://s2.loli.net/2024/05/03/PKSC76qlAMhXvNc.png)  
#### Hanging Signboards  (1.20+)
 

Ginkgo and maple signboards now have hanging versions.
![3.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/KnBrbhXvWoDF9T5.png)  

#### Materials, Equipment, and Tools
Sakura Ingot

An expensive material that can be used to craft sakura equipment and tools. These have better

performance than netherite equips and can be obtained using materials from the Overworld.
![4.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/01/29/zY1hwOFQBxXV3jn.png)  

#### Nether Ores

Adding Nether Ores. It will generation in nether and make nether survival is easy then vanilla.

They are no different from ordinary ores,except that they are generated in the nether.
![ore](https://s2.loli.net/2023/07/30/oSKrBygWRijvxne.png)
 
#### Translation  
Submitting translations for Maple can be done via our [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/minecraft-maple) page. Consider helping us out if you're fluent in any language at all! Alternatively, translations can still be submitted via pull requests.  
  
#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
![image1.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/08/14/3B1adSw2HkEJhUx.png)
